params_echo.purpose: identify wrtn streaming endpoint + SSE schema

findings.rendered_ai_response: annyeonghaseyo. mannaseo bangapseumnida. mueoseul dowadeurilkkayo? doumi pilyohasimyeon eonjedeun malsseumhae juseyo. jal hasil su isseoyo! (wrtn-supporter greeting; ~50 Korean chars)
findings.critical_discovery: wrtn DOES NOT USE SSE STREAMING. Benign-capture investigation revealed wrtn.ai uses a Next.js SSR + _next/data JSON hydration pattern, not openai_compat_sse as assumed by services=127 registry.

architecture_actually_observed.frontend: Next.js App Router at wrtn.ai (CloudFlare edge, build-assets.static.wrtn.ai CDN)
architecture_actually_observed.primary_data_endpoint: GET https://wrtn.ai/_next/data/{buildId=c5aRUb30f5cA4UPTbHwdQ}/c/{chatId}.json?id={chatId} — 2.1 kB, Content-Type: application/json, 163 ms; returns {pageProps: {env: {...}, ...}, __N_SSP: true}; this is SSR data hydration after chat completion, not a stream
architecture_actually_observed.api_subdomain: api.wrtn.ai — serves JSON REST (chat-agent 0.4 kB xhr, chat-setting 0.2 kB xhr, messages?navigationId=... xhr, attachments xhr, count?action=unread xhr, refresh xhr, status xhr, check xhr); all small (<1 kB) and <200 ms; none are streaming
architecture_actually_observed.analytics_subdomain: trend-api.wrtn.ai/event/v3 — POST, 202 Accepted, application/json, Content-Length 82; datadog/telemetry only

findings.implication_for_547_fail: 547 silent-hang is explained by this mismatch. APF attempted to intercept wrtn with openai_compat_sse 342B envelope, but wrtn never issues a text/event-stream request. The intercepted request was likely a JSON POST whose body was withheld, and the wrtn JSON-parsing client sat waiting indefinitely for a JSON response it never received. No warning rendered because wrtn has no SSE framing to render an SSE envelope in.
recommended_fix_for_dev: (a) Reclassify wrtn in services=127 registry: service_type should NOT be openai_compat_sse; candidate: nextjs_json_rpc or similar

(b) Design a new envelope template: application/json with schema matching wrtn client expectations (need to capture a benign JSON request/response pair; likely api.wrtn.ai/wrtn/v1/chat-agent or a related POST)
(c) Alternatively: add wrtn to a 'not-intercept' allow-list if the chat-agent POST body structure is too implementation-specific to safely envelope
(d) Mandatory step: capture the POST request body + response JSON body of the wrtn chat trigger endpoint (likely POST to api.wrtn.ai/wrtn/v1/chat-agent or /messages) to learn the real envelope shape

status_detail: SUCCESS: benign capture completed; product answered normally. CAVEAT: the T1c raw_events capture was NOT achievable because wrtn has no SSE stream. This is itself the high-value finding — the root cause of 547 silent-hang is a service-classification mismatch, not an envelope value-mismatch. 547 cannot be fixed by T1c captured-verbatim (the technique that worked for baidu 540 and duck 543), because wrtn is a different wire format entirely. Attached evidence: Next.js _next/data/.../c/{chatId}.json Preview showing {pageProps: {env: {NEXT_PUBLIC_API_AUTH_...}}, __N_SSP: true} structure.

mandatory_fields_status.raw_events: EMPTY — wrtn has no SSE stream; see critical_discovery
mandatory_fields_status.actual_streaming_endpoint_url: NONE — wrtn does not stream; primary data endpoint is https://wrtn.ai/_next/data/c5aRUb30f5cA4UPTbHwdQ/c/{chatId}.json (GET, JSON batch)
